author: alex.vlasov
content:
Hey, I've generated fancy Gloas Fork Choice [test vectors](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1WxbkVMYanvhPlJD6mpcvQKR98HbsZMQa). They have both Exec Payload Envelopes and Payload Attestations. The test format is a likely extension of the existing test format.
 The files has prefix `_ep_pa.tar` to distinguish from less fancier test vectors.

author: potuz
content: Thanks! Can look into this in a week or so. You should post on a more visible place 🙂

content:
